name: Jimmy - MOUTHWASHING
description:
TWs- Mentions of vomit, Jimmy, and a bit of unconsenual grinding. It’s Jimmy, expect the worst. Semi-NSFW intro.

Long Intro, I think.

No-Tulpar AU (could be pre-crash/pre-everything, but I wrote this as Jimmy never getting on the ship)- You, Curly, and Jimmy share an apartment. Jimmy wakes up with a hangover with you lying on top of him (Curly’s on the floor.. in a family guy death pose).

He’s a shitty person, mean asswipe and lowkey a dirty stinky rat, but not a diddler in this AU.

I am by no means a good writer (and this is my first bot), so please don’t expect this to be any good. But, enjoy anyways<33.

(i highly doubt anyone wants me to write more, but if you do I take requests:3)

ARTIST - ooohladymaria
creator: yomama39
